title: bam-filter pipeline parameters
description: Filter a BAM file by regions defined in a BED file

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define the input files and where results are written.

bam.description: Path to the input BAM file.
bam.help_text: Aligned reads in BAM format. An index (.bai) will be created if not present.

bed.description: Path to the BED file with regions to keep.
bed.help_text: Tab-separated BED with at least three columns: chrom, start, end. Reads overlapping these intervals are retained.

outdir.description: Directory where results will be published.
